feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1930 201 1729 82
TR 1780 172 1608 67

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: 每日英语 听力学习版
entry.id: 每日英语 听力学习版-tr-1776207189815
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • 每日英语听力VIP订阅：₺499,99 → ₺149,99 [₺149,99 ~ ₺499,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺4,99

In-App Purchases

  • 每日英语听力VIP订阅：₺149,99
  • 赖世雄中级美语下（视频课）：₺499,99
  • 赖世雄中级美语上（视频课）：₺499,99
  • 大学英语_外刊精读 | 2025年度TOP100精选：₺1.499,99
  • On Writing Well 英语原版书精读课：₺3.999,99
  • 听口直通自由—中高级英语精听：₺1.499,99
  • 听口直通自由—口语输出课：₺799,99
  • 听口直通自由—语音基础：₺299,99
  • 肖维青英文原著精读课-纳尼亚传奇篇：₺1.499,99

Application Description

《每日英语 听力学习版》，专为英语学习者打造，精听细读，助你更好学英语。 【资源丰富，每日更新】 - 各类考试：初高中、大学四六级、考研、雅思托福、GRE等备考听力材料； - 经典教材：走遍美国、赖世雄、新东方等丰富教材； - 兴趣学习：有声读物、名人演讲、公开课、少儿英语、影视英语等丰富资源。 【功能强大，操作简便】 - 划词搜索：与《欧路词典》无缝集成，长按查词，即指即译； - 播放调节：8档语速调节、4种循环模式，单句精听、听写、测验，满足不同阶段的需求； - 收藏下载：支持批量下载，离线随时收听； - 听力上传：支持听众上传自己的资源，我们为您制作同步高亮字幕； - 跟读打分：跟读后可查看单词的发音是否准确，纠正发音问题。 【特色模块，辅助学习】 - 精听党：名著原声朗读，精编版讲义讲解，配套习题测试。 - 配音秀：提供原声听力材料的配音，秀出你的发音； - 听力挑战：加入听力训练计划，日积月累提高英语。 【VIP订阅服务说明】 - 订阅服务：VIP连续包月（1个月）、VIP连续包半年（6个月）、每日外刊连续包月（1个月） - 订阅价格：以iAP申请信息为准，例如VIP包月服务为18元/月；VIP包半年服务为68元/6个月；每日外刊服务为63元/月 - 付款：用户确认购买并付款后计入iTunes账户 - 苹果iTunes账户会在到期前24小时内扣费，扣费成功后订阅周期顺延一个订阅周期 - 如需取消订阅，请手动打开苹果手机“设置”-->进入“iTunes Store与App Store”-->点击“Apple ID”，选择“查看Apple ID”，进入“账户设置”页面，点击“订阅”，选择听力VIP取消订阅即可。如未在订阅期结束的至少24小时前关闭订阅，此订阅将自动续订。 - 自动续费规则：https://www.eudic.net/v4/en/home/service - 隐私协议：https://www.eudic.net/v4/home/privacy

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Bloons TD 5
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Pile O' Monkey Money：₺249,99 → ₺149,99 [₺129,99 ~ ₺249,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺149,99

In-App Purchases

  • Bundle O' Monkey Money：₺149,99
  • Pile O' Monkey Money：₺149,99
  • Tower Unlock All Upgrades：₺49,99
  • 500 Monkey Money：₺49,99
  • Vault O' Tokens：₺499,99
  • Double Cash Mode：₺499,99
  • Vault O' Monkey Money：₺999,99
  • Rank Up：₺49,99
  • Healthy Bananas：₺49,99

Application Description

Five-star tower defense with unrivaled depth and replayability. Now with rewarded leaderboards for even more fun and challenge! The Bloons are back and this time they mean business! Build awesome towers, choose your favorite upgrades, hire cool new Special Agents, and pop every last invading Bloon! Featuring 2 brand new Towers, cool Special Agents, glorious retina graphics, original Tracks and Special Missions, a whole new tier of Specialty Building upgrades, and the powerful Monkey Lab to further upgrade your towers, Bloons TD 5 delivers hours and hours of fun, challenging play to fans and new players alike. Hours and Hours of Awesome Gameplay: * 90+ Tracks * 21 powerful towers with Activated Abilities and 2 upgrade paths * 10 Special Agents * Online Co-op play * Multi-track Odyssey Challenges * Boss Bloon Special Events * 10 Special Missions * 250+ Random Missions * Daily Challenges * New Bloon enemies - tougher Camos, Regrow Bloons, and the fearsome ZOMG * 50+ Game Center Achievements and Challenges * iCloud Support * 3 different game modes * Freeplay mode after mastering a track * 4 difficulty settings and family-friendly theme so anyone can play And that's just the beginning - regular planned updates will keep Bloons TD 5 fresh, fun, and challenging for many months to come. Now it's time to pop some Bloons! Remember to save to iCloud after each victory or purchase to save your progress. iPad version also available - check out Bloons TD 5 HD for full screen UI awesomeness! https://ninjakiwi.com/terms

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Computer Basics: PC Guide
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

The application contains a variety of articles and tips for anyone who works with computer technology or is simply interested in it. It is divided into three sections: 1. Hardware 2. PC assembly 3. Software The Hardware section contains information about all computer components, peripherals, and other equipment. The basic theory of computer parts is explained in simple language. Here you will find articles about% the motherboard, central processor, RAM, graphics card, and other hardware. Hardware topics include: • Motherboard, central processing unit, random access memory, power supply unit, graphics card, optical disk drive, sound card, cooling systems, computer cases • Hard disk drives (HDD), solid-state drives (SSD), optical disks, USB flash drives • Keyboards, mice, webcams, microphones, image scanners • Monitors, speakers, headphones, printers, projectors • Network interface controllers, routers, mobile broadband modems • Gaming devices, uninterruptible power supplies, peripheral connectors The PC assembly section offers step-by-step guides and illustrated instructions on how to build your own computer or replace its components. Detailed diagrams and pictures will help you understand how to assemble a PC, install or upgrade equipment, and fit components. PC assembly topics include: • Motherboard installation • CPU installation • Applying and replacing thermal paste • Installing a graphics card, RAM modules, power supply, air cooling system, sound card, SSD, or HDD The Software section provides information about computer operating systems and the basic programs that most PC users work with. Software topics include: • Operating systems • Essential programs This application is ideal for anyone who wants to improve or refresh their knowledge of computer technology. After completing the course, you will be able to assemble your own computer or upgrade it confidently. The app contains more than 50 articles and includes a search function for terms and definitions. We regularly update the course on computer fundamentals. You can also report errors or suggest improvements.

entry.title: Balatro
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺499,99 → ₺264,99 [₺264,99 ~ ₺499,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺264,99

Application Description

Welcome to the official Balatro mobile game! Hypnotic and endlessly satisfying, Balatro is a magical mix of card games like Solitaire and Poker, that lets you twist the rules in ways never seen before! Your goal is to beat the Boss Blinds by making strong poker hands. Find new Jokers that change the game and create awesome and exciting combos! Win enough chips to beat tricky bosses, and find hidden bonus hands and decks as you play. You’ll need all the help you can get to beat the big boss, win the final challenge, and win the game. Features: * Remastered controls for touch screen devices. * Each run is different: every pick-up, discard and joker can dramatically alter the course of your run. * Multiple game items: discover over 150 Jokers, each with special powers. Use them with different decks,upgrade cards and vouchers to boost your scores. * Different Game modes: Campaign mode and challenge mode for you to play. * Beautiful Pixel Art: Immerse yourself in the CRT fuzz and enjoy detailed, hand-crafted pixel art.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad
